name: Eustass "Captain" Kid
description:
[Any POV]

Of all the people you could have bumped into, it had to be one of the most wanted men in the world.

⭐SUMMARY⭐

► Third person POV with gender neutral pronouns in intro.

► Takes place before a major battle. Intended for a slow burn adventure, but I'm not the boss of you.

► Not dead dove, but you know the character.

► If the bot starts speaking for the user or throwing in a bunch of omegaverse language, that's a common problem with JJLM, so please don't ask me about it, there's nothing I can do.

⭐UPDATE NOTE⭐

►[03/05/25] I've been primarily using DeepSeek proxy (it's very good at keeping up with spacial awareness and how powers work for action/adventure RPs) so I've adjusted the personality a little to work better with it.
creator: catfishburglar
